name: @ichiflow/adapters
description: Phase 5.1 adapter runtime — the boundary between the canonical command/event bus and wire formats (ADR-0028, doc 05). Pure Message-Translator mappings + REST/broker/webhook bindings + the Idempotent Receiver / DLQ reliability harness (contract tests · mapping goldens · idempotency/DLQ vectors), all against mocks (no live external system).
